title: TOTKraft
description: A zelda inspired modpack with some technical mods
body:
# Land need heroes

Make your own story, become a legendary hero, rebuild cities or simploy chill with some music played by a bird.

## Make your own town

With minecolonies you will be able to create some big town and help people with your talents

## Travel to the sky

Some mods add sky structures, explore them to loot some artifacts

## Make some contraptions

With create, the world could be more technical and you are able to make your own factories !
